name: manage_build_scenes
description: Manage the scene list in Editor Build Settings. Actions: 'list' (default) shows all scenes with indices; 'add' adds a scene; 'remove' removes by path or index; 'set' replaces the entire list with an ordered array; 'enable'/'disable' toggles a scene without removing it.

scene_path.description: Asset path of a scene (e.g. 'Assets/Scenes/Main.unity'). Used by add, remove, enable, disable.

index.description: For 'add': insert position (0-based). For 'remove': remove by index instead of path.

enabled.description: For 'add': whether the scene is enabled. Default: true.

scenes.description: For 'set': ordered array of scene asset paths. Replaces the entire build scene list. All scenes are enabled by default.
